title: pelargonium × trattinickiae
intro: Pelargonium × trattinickiae, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family, derived from the cross between Pelargonium graveolens and Pelargonium capitatum. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in herbal remedies for anxiety, stress, and menstrual issues due to its high concentration of geraniol and linalool, which have a calming effect on the body. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and promote relaxation, making it a popular ingredient in aromatherapy and herbal preparations. Rose Geranium can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which are often used to relieve symptoms of PMS and menopause.
